rulings.Case Title: GARY E GROTE et al VS. DAVID DRIVER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents (Set No 2) And Special Interrogatories (Set No 2 And No 3) Without Any Objections And Request For Evidentiary And Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, May 26, 2011, line 1, DEFENDANTS DAVID DRIVER, KRISHNA RALLAPALLI, PHILIPPINE RALLAPALLI, RALLAPALLI, EMELIA Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents (Set No 2) And Special Interrogatories (Set No 2 And No 3) Without Any Objections And Request For Evidentiary And Monetary Sanctions. GRANTED. PLAINTIFF MUST FILE RESPONSES WITHIN 20 DAYS. SANCTIONS REQUEST IS DENIED. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: GARY E GROTE et al VS. DAVID DRIVER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Third Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And To Compel Production Documents And Privelege Log In Compliance With The Court'S Prior Orders, Or Alternatively, For Evidentiary And Issue Sanctions, And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, May 26, 2011, line 1, DEFENDANTS DAVID DRIVER, KRISHNA RALLAPALLI, PHILIPPINE RALLAPALLI, RALLAPALLI, EMELIA Notice Of Third Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And To Compel Production Documents And Privelege Log In Compliance With The Court's Prior Orders, Or Alternatively, For Evidentiary And Issue Sanctions, And Request For Monetary Sanctions. PLAINTIFF MUST COMPLY WITH COURT'S PREVIOUS ORDER WITHIN 20 DAYS. PLAINTIFF'S FORMER COUNSEL RALPH KERSTETTER IS TO PAY DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL $3505.00 IN SANCTIONS BY JUNE 15, 2011. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: MARIO CANEL et al VS. FONG'S FORTUNE COOKIES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For Terminating Sanctions, Or Issue Or Evidence Sanctions And Monetary Sanctions

GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. DEFENDANT ROGER MAC'S ANSWER IS STRICKEN AND PLAINTIFF MAY ENTER DEFAULT WITH THE CLERK OF COURT. DEFENDANT ROGER MAC MUST PAY $1640 IN SANCTIONS TO PLAINTIFF WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. =(302/LMG)
